main_hypothesis.justification: Anchor 'oxidative degradation por breakthrough cloro libre + fallo SBS' literal.

recommended_action.justification: Stop RO + verify SBS pump + replace SBS solution + flush system — match operacional.

requested_data.justification: Pide 'concentración cloro libre en permeato' — lugar conceptualmente incorrecto.

decision_change_condition.justification: Single: si cloro <0.05 a pesar ORP alto → sensor drift.
